Website Flipping.closeScript: So here's the deal — $500 and it's yours. {value_prop}. I'll connect your domain, set up email, hand you the keys. You pay after it's live. Want to do this?

valueProps.HVAC: One AC repair call costs $300-500. This site costs less than one call.
valueProps.Electrician: One emergency electrical job pays $400-800. This site costs less than one job.
valueProps.Plumber: One emergency plumbing call pays $350-600. This site costs less than one call.
valueProps.Roofer: One roofing job is $5k+. This site is 10% of one customer.
valueProps.default: I'll connect your domain, set up email, hand you the keys.

objectionHandlers.no_site: I looked — you don't have any website. When someone Googles '{category} near me' they find your competitors. Let me text you what I built.
objectionHandlers.has_site: Actually — I looked at it. It's a generic placeholder page, not a real website. Let me text you what I built — you'll see the difference.

objectionHandlers.response: What's one new customer worth? This site costs less than one service call. If it brings you even one job, it paid for itself. You pay after it's live.
No problem — keep the site anyway. I already built it. If you change your mind, text me at this number. Site's done, just needs your name on it.
Totally fair. Is it the price or the idea you're unsure about? Because I can work with one of those.

Real Estate.closeScript: Here's what I'm thinking — your property at {address} has an estimated value around {est_value}. I have a cash buyer who's interested in the area. No agents, no commissions, no repairs needed. Can we take a look this week?

valueProps.default: No commissions. No repairs. Cash closing in 7-14 days.

objectionHandlers.response: Totally understand — most people aren't until the right offer comes along. If I could get you a cash offer above market with zero fees, would it be worth 10 minutes?
No problem at all. What if I told you we work alongside agents — you keep yours, we just bring the buyer? No dual agency, no conflict.
Happy to. What's the best email? I'll send you a free property valuation and a sample offer range — no commitment, just numbers.

objectionHandlers.trigger: How did you get my info?
objectionHandlers.response: Public records — your property came up as one we can potentially help. We work with homeowners in situations like {lead_type} to get them top dollar without the hassle.
